title: Project Manager Marketing & E-Commerce (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in Marketing or comparable education with relevant experience
Multi-year experience in marketing with project and process management focus
Project management and holistic analytical understanding
Communication skills for agency and vendor coordination
matched_skills: Marketing project management — IPC: 4 product launches, GTM strategy, agency/vendor management
Cross-functional project coordination as interface between departments and external parties (IPC, HSBC)
Process optimisation and workflow standardisation — IPC: SOPs, training materials for GTM delivery
Vendor and partner management — IPC: external vendors, channel partners
Performance tracking and KPI reporting — IPC: marketing KPI tracking, ROI analytics
Executive-ready reporting and presentation — ECE Group, HSBC
Digital content and communications (Moli Media: live-stream events, digital production)
missing_skills: E-commerce platform hands-on experience (NKD-specific tools, digital channel automation)
Specific marketing workflow tool (DAM, PIM) expertise
core_responsibilities: Lead, steer and coordinate cross-departmental marketing activities as interface between departments and agencies
Coordinate, steer and support introduction of system-supported processes and workflows for efficiency
Build and continuously develop a cross-departmental tool for planning and communication optimisation
Ensure smooth connection between content creation and automated digital channel distribution
Manage internal image database: structure, processes, permissions and content maintenance
recommended_emphasis: IPC Marketing: 4 B2B product launches with full GTM coordination across vendors and internal teams — directly matches cross-departmental PM role
IPC: Developed SOPs and training materials standardising GTM delivery — mirrors process optimisation and workflow mandate
HSBC: Central interface role across Product, Engineering, Marketing and C-suite — demonstrates the cross-functional hub skill set required
Moli Media: Digital production coordination and vendor management for large-scale content events — relevant to content-to-channel workflow role
summary: Boru scores 68.2 (moderate match) with genuine marketing project management experience from IPC and cross-functional coordination from HSBC aligning well to the role's core mandate. The IPC experience covering 4 product launches, vendor management and GTM SOPs maps closely to what NKD seeks. Gaps include retail/e-commerce platform-specific knowledge and image database management. The application is viable with emphasis on transferable marketing PM breadth and process optimisation track record.
